recommended_action: 1) Fix ErrCode 10001 LONG SL race condition: before submitting a Buy order, re-fetch last_price and assert SL < last_price; abort with cause if not (do not auto-flip account mode). 2) Run backfill_orphan_pnl_script for trade #1503 null PnL. 3) Confirm bybit_2 live-mode recovery path and document it — if circuit breaker auto-trip is still present in code, remove it per Prime Directive (no auto-flip). 4) Manually SSH to check /api/bot/shadow/stats to resolve FU-20260516-001, or add shadow/stats to diag relay allowlist. 5) Investigate monitor close path failure pattern on trade #1503 and the 12+ historical 'gate was blocked' trades.
